title: ₹600 Cr IIT Madras Unicorn Frontier Fund I announced at E-Summit 2026
summary: IIT Madras Research Park and Unicorn India Ventures announced the ₹600 crore 'IIT Madras Unicorn Frontier Fund I' (with a ₹400 crore greenshoe option) at the inauguration of E-Summit 2026 by Prof. V. Kamakoti. The 10+2-year patient-capital fund will back 25+ IP-led deep-tech startups — robotics, spacetech, deftech, semicon, medtech — with first cheques of ₹8–10 crore, a significant share sourced from the IITM ecosystem.

title: SIE and IITM Incubation Cell launch 'Translation Endeavors' partnership
summary: The School of Innovation and Entrepreneurship and the IIT Madras Incubation Cell signed an MoU with Translation Endeavors — the venture-building initiative co-founded by Kunal Upadhyay (IIMA Ventures) — to accelerate the journey from science innovation to market-ready ventures through seed funding, acceleration support and access to world-class infrastructure. The initiative was unveiled in the presence of the Hon'ble Governor of Tamil Nadu.

title: Avishkar Hyperloop crowned champions of the Global Hyperloop Competition 2026
summary: CFI's Avishkar Hyperloop team won the championship at the Global Hyperloop Competition 2026 — the latest in a run of podium finishes that includes Raftar's 2nd place at Formula Bharat and Team Anveshak's 2nd runner-up finish with the Best Rover Mission award at the International Rover Challenge 2026.

title: Agnirath becomes first Indian team in 15 years to cross 600 km at the World Solar Challenge
summary: CFI's solar racing team Agnirath covered 600+ km at the World Solar Challenge 2025 in Australia — the first Indian team to do so in 15 years.

title: SIE at the inaugural IIT Madras Technology Summit, Bharat Mandapam
summary: SIE showcased its deep-tech venture pipeline at the inaugural IIT Madras Technology Summit in New Delhi, inaugurated by Shri Dharmendra Pradhan, Hon'ble Minister of Education. The summit brought together government, industry and academia around technology-driven solutions for a Viksit Bharat.

title: Delta Expo 2026: student startups on show at IIT Madras
summary: Delta Expo 2026, hosted by SIE, brought bold ideas to life across campus — student startups and breakthrough technologies open to students, visitors and the public. The expo was inaugurated by the Hon'ble Governor of Tamil Nadu, Shri Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar.

title: New advisors take charge at Nirmaan and CFI
summary: Prof. Murugaiyan Amirthalingam takes charge as Advisor of Nirmaan and Prof. Manish Anand as Advisor of CFI, beginning a new phase of leadership for the student innovation pipeline at IIT Madras.

title: Prof. Satyanarayanan Seshadri assumes charge as Head of SIE
summary: Prof. Satyanarayanan Seshadri succeeds Prof. Prabhu Rajagopal as Head of SIE, building on a strong foundation to accelerate the school's active venture-creation model.

title: Research Conclave 2025 hosted at CFI
summary: The Centre for Innovation hosted Research Conclave 2025, bringing together students, researchers and innovators for a full day of learning, collaboration and knowledge exchange.

title: IIT Madras launches the School of Innovation and Entrepreneurship
summary: IIT Madras formally launched SIE to give an academic backbone to its startup ecosystem — uniting CFI, Nirmaan, degree programmes, founder fellowships and seed support under one school.

title: National Security Advisor Shri Ajit Doval visits the Innovation Hub
summary: NSA Shri Ajit Doval visited the Sudha & Shankar Innovation Hub, recognising the impact of student-led startups and the strength of the IIT Madras innovation ecosystem.
